title: zeylanidium crustaceum
intro: Zeylanidium crustaceum, also known as Ceylon lead tree or Ceylon iron tree, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
